name: autotask-mcp
description: Every Autotask entity at the command line, plus a local SQLite mirror that answers ticket-aging, workload, unbilled-time, and account-360 questions no other Autotask tool can.

autotask_api_integration_code.title: AUTOTASK_API_INTEGRATION_CODE
autotask_api_integration_code.description: Sets AUTOTASK_API_INTEGRATION_CODE for the Autotask PSA MCP server.

autotask_psa_secret.title: AUTOTASK_PSA_SECRET
autotask_psa_secret.description: Sets AUTOTASK_PSA_SECRET for the Autotask PSA MCP server.

autotask_psa_user_name.title: AUTOTASK_PSA_USER_NAME
autotask_psa_user_name.description: Sets AUTOTASK_PSA_USER_NAME for the Autotask PSA MCP server.
